name: agentic-security-audit
description: Run a focused security audit before publishing agentic open-source contributions.

interface.shortDescription: Audit agentic contribution diffs before PRs.
interface.longDescription: Adds a reusable security audit playbook for Codex and companion instructions for GitHub Copilot and Claude. The audit focuses on security, privacy, dependency, and supply-chain risk introduced by a contribution before publication.
defaultPrompt: Review these changed files before I publish a PR.
Check this agentic workflow for supply-chain risk.
